working_on.task: Implement Draggable Floating Button, Bottom Sheet styling, and standard Google Sign-In button
working_on.notes: Fully implemented the AI Financial Coach with custom system prompts (Stern, Encouraging, Analytical) and 24h caching. Optimized UI by replacing fixed AI card with a draggable floating button snapping to screen edges. Made bottom sheet border-radius and margins stick to edge. Standardized Google Sign-In buttons across the app to comply with Google Branding Guidelines. Fixed guest login session override bug on app restart and saved user info directly to app local storage.

pending_tasks.task: Implement Phase 1 data sync upgrade (Bulk Insert & Transaction RPC)

recent_changes.description: Fix guest session override bug in AuthRepositoryImpl on startup and save user locally to SharedPreferences
Standardize Google Sign-In buttons with shared GoogleSignInButton widget
Implement Draggable Floating AI Coach button with snap physics and bottom-pinned slide-up sheet
Implement AI Financial Coach core and custom system prompts with caching

errors_encountered.error: Supabase stream null overrides Guest user state
errors_encountered.solution: Check local guest user fallback inside AuthRepositoryImpl onAuthStateChange stream before emitting null.
Migrate show() and zonedSchedule() calls to use named parameters for required id and details fields.

decisions_made.reason: Avoid occupying vertical screen space on Goal Scenario details by hiding full AI card in a slide-up bottom sheet triggered by a draggable floating button.
Create a shared GoogleSignInButton utilizing official multi-color SVG and Roboto font to comply with Google Branding Guidelines and reduce code duplication.
Cache AI advice locally under goalId+date key to reduce Gemini API costs by 90% and prevent excessive calls during scenario parameter adjustments.

decisions_made.decision: Save session to App Local Storage
decisions_made.reason: Save logged_in_user data locally to SharedPreferences to allow instant loading of auth state during app startup without waiting for async network handshake.
